Photo.Name: shanghai.metro.tower-jianshuo-think.in.cubicle.jpg

Photo.Name: xiamen-jianshuo-gold.jpg

Photo.Name: us-envy-fun.jpg
Photo.Title: Envy

Photo.Name: changsha-houses-scenery.jpg
Photo.Title: Scenery of Chang Sha

Photo.Name: changsha-huantian.hotel.lobby.JPG
Photo.Title: Lobby of Hua Tian Hotel in Chang Sha

Photo.Name: changsha.huantian-jianshuo-working.before.mirror.JPG
Photo.Title: Jian Shuo working before mirror in hotel in Chang Sha

Photo.Name: changsha.huantian-jianshuo-working.JPG
Photo.Title: Jian Shuo working in hotel in Chang Sha

Photo.Name: daocheng.riwa-cuanyu-etc.jpg
Photo.Title: Jian Shuo wang a little school girl in Riwa - people there are shy but warmhearted

Photo.Name: daocheng-balang.highland.jpg
Photo.Title: High land covered by grass - green, brown and yellow

Photo.Name: daocheng-balang.highland2.jpg
Photo.Title: High land - mountains after mountains

Photo.Name: daocheng-balang.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: Mountains partly covered by snow after one night of snowing

Photo.Name: daocheng-balang.mount.trees.jpg
Photo.Title: Typical high land scene

Photo.Name: daocheng-black.mounts.river-night.jpg
Photo.Title: River at drawn

Photo.Name: daocheng-chonggu.temple.baddish.jpg
Photo.Title: Spendid Tibetan Baddish

Photo.Name: daocheng-chonggu.temple.jpg
Photo.Title: Best wishes to the guests

Photo.Name: daocheng-house.horse.jpg
Photo.Title: Houses and villages on grass land

Photo.Name: daocheng-jianshuo-balang.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: Jian Shuo step out of the bus and posed before Mt. Balang

Photo.Name: daocheng-jianshuo-before.balang.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: Somewhere near Xiao Jing

Photo.Name: daocheng-jianshuo-before.river.of.xinduqiao.jpg
Photo.Title: Jian Shuo before the river of Xinduqiao - it is another morning and we were waiting for our bus to be repaired

Photo.Name: daocheng-mounts-besides.roads.jpg
Photo.Title: Mountains besides road

Photo.Name: daocheng-mounts.trough.window.jpg
Photo.Title: Mountains throught the window of - the window of ....... a.... WC

Photo.Name: daocheng-rainbow-cross.mountains.jpg
Photo.Title: Rainbow like a bridge, connecting the two side of the mountains

Photo.Name: daocheng-rainbow.fields.jpg
Photo.Title: Rainbow on highland - it is a rainbow saw at 4400 meters high above the sea level

Photo.Name: daocheng-river.and.cows.jpg
Photo.Title: Winding streams and groups of cattles

Photo.Name: daocheng-roads-balang.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: Tough roads on Mt. Balang

Photo.Name: daocheng-shangrila.village.jpg
Photo.Title: The tents we lived - it has a beautiful name - Shangri-La Village - but it is actually tents

Photo.Name: daocheng-si.gu.niang.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: Mt. Siguniang (4-ladies mount.)

Photo.Name: daocheng-snow.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: Snow mountains

Photo.Name: daocheng-snow.world.jpg
Photo.Title: We just left the sunny Daocheng and suddenly entered a snow world like this

Photo.Name: daocheng-tibetan.house.jpg
Photo.Title: This is the Tibetan house we lived for two nights

Photo.Name: daocheng-village.jpg
Photo.Title: Villages near Riwa

Photo.Name: daocheng-village.near.rewa.jpg
Photo.Title: Villages near Riwa

Photo.Name: daocheng-xiannairi-tales.jpg
Photo.Title: The holy mountain - Xiannairi

Photo.Name: daocheng.318-wc.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: The roof of a wild WC on the way from Xinduqiao to Kangding

Photo.Name: daocheng.balangmount-cloud.and.trees-out.of.window.jpg
Photo.Title: Mount. Balang out of the bus window

Photo.Name: daocheng.balangmount-ice.mount-first.take.jpg
Photo.Title: Mount. Balang and the distant snow capped mountains. The first time we saw snow mountains on the road.

Photo.Name: daocheng.balangmount-mounts.jpg
Photo.Title: A much clearer snow mountains. But compared with the snow mountains we saw later, they are nothing

Photo.Name: daocheng.balangmount.318-special.wc.jpg
Photo.Title: One of the many special WC we saw all the road. There is not doors and back walls - the WC with the best scene but obviously embarrasing

Photo.Name: daocheng.haizi-jianshuo-in.snow.field.jpg
Photo.Title: Snow field of Mt. Haizi. It is a very cold morning on Oct 3

Photo.Name: daocheng.haizi-snow.jpg
Photo.Title: The snow covered plain - I didn't used any speical lens - it is the real color we saw using our bare eyes

Photo.Name: daocheng.haizi-snow.stone.jpg
Photo.Title: Big stones covered by snow

Photo.Name: daocheng.haizimount-snow.war.jpg
Photo.Title: People of the same bus are playing snow war - two lovely girls from Guangzhou have never seen snow, let alone playing snow war - they were so excited

Photo.Name: daocheng.litang-night.jpg
Photo.Title: Night of Litang - Litang's sudden appear on our way to Daocheng suprised me a lot for I saw the lights on the 4000 meter high land.

Photo.Name: daocheng.riwa-age.of.81.woman.jpg
Photo.Title: A 81 year old lady sitting besides the road of Riwa

Photo.Name: daocheng.riwa-girls.and.mother.jpg
Photo.Title: Girls and their monther. Maybe due to lack of communication, they still wear the millitary cap which is popular in 1940s

Photo.Name: daocheng.riwa-jianshuo.girl.jpg
Photo.Title: Jian Shuo wang a little school girl in Riwa - people there are shy but warmhearted

Photo.Name: daocheng.riwa-many.people.jpg
Photo.Title: May villages gather at the noon of Oct 31. It was lunch time and there were many travellers

Photo.Name: daocheng.riwa-river.town.jpg
Photo.Title: The riwa towns

Photo.Name: daocheng.riwa-villagers.jpg
Photo.Title: Many villages gather to see the big buses and travellers - they are most intersted in the digital cameras I was using - they cheered loundly when they previewed themselves using the LCD on my camera.

Photo.Name: daocheng.xinduqiao-2.tibetan.house.jpg
Photo.Title: Typical Tibetan houses in Xinduqiao

Photo.Name: daocheng.xinduqiao-house.trhough.door.jpg
Photo.Title: Abandoned house - only a wall and the door frame was left

Photo.Name: daocheng.xinduqiao-tibetan.house.jpg
Photo.Title: Another Tibetan house in Xinduqiao

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-branches-in.fog.jpg
Photo.Title: Mountains can hardly see in the clouds and fogs

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-chong.gu.temple-river.jpg
Photo.Title: Rivers and trees before Chonggu Temple

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-chong.gu.temple-river2.jpg
Photo.Title: Riviers and trees before Chonggu Temple

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-chonggu.temple-sky.jpg
Photo.Title: The spraying flags are hanging in the temple

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-chonggu.temple.jpg
Photo.Title: Chonggu Temple - it is a small temple with just a two or three houses, but due to the fact it is located near the three holy mountains, it is famous

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-crystal.clear.water.jpg
Photo.Title: In this photo, I just want to show you the crystal clear water - can you imagine there is water above the small white stones? Yes! The stream is flowing and my shadow is drop in to the stream

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-jianshuo-high.jpg
Photo.Title: I climbed onto a big stone near Lake Pearl so I can see the whole picture of the lake

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-jingfan.jpg
Photo.Title: Spraying flags on top of the mountains

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-luo.rong.field.and.xian.nai.ri.jpg
Photo.Title: Luorong Cattle Field - The most grand holy mountain Xiannairi is right before you and the green trees and grass-covered plain

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-luo.rong.field.jpg
Photo.Title: Anothe picture of Xiannari

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-mount.and.grass.jpg
Photo.Title: This is Yangmaiyong Peak

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-mount.in.cloud.jpg
Photo.Title: Mountains in clouds - like those in a fairy tale

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-mount.in.front.of.pearl.lake.jpg
Photo.Title: Lake Pearl and Mt. Xiannairi

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-mounts.in.clouds.jpg
Photo.Title: Holy mountains in the clouds

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-on.horses.jpg
Photo.Title: Marching toward the Luorong Cattle field

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-pearl.lake-branches.forhead.jpg
Photo.Title: Incredible Lake Pearl!! Look at the color of the water

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-pearl.lake-lake.trees.jpg
Photo.Title: Lake Pearl - shining under the sun

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-pearl.lake.xiannairi.jpg
Photo.Title: Lake Pearl and Xiannairi

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-rivers.jpg
Photo.Title: The brook is singing and running from the mountains along the valley of Yading

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-spear.snow.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: Yangmaiyong looks like a spear pointing to the sky

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-stone-with.jing.jpg
Photo.Title: Stacked stone with best wishes on it

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-stone.house.jpg
Photo.Title: Stone house - not very sure what it is used for - in Chonggu Temple

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-tibetan.jpg
Photo.Title: Tibetan Baddish

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-tree.branch.sky.jpg
Photo.Title: I have never see a more beautiful sky than this one

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-west.mount.jpg
Photo.Title: The mountains

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-wood.in.water.jpg
Photo.Title: A big tree lying in the jade-like water

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-xian.nai.ri-big.jpg
Photo.Title: Grand Xiannairi looks so close

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-xian.nai.ri-black.mount.ahead.jpg
Photo.Title: The peak of Xiannairi

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-xian.nai.ri-black.mount.ahead2.jpg
Photo.Title: The peak of Xiannairi

Photo.Name: daocheng.yading-xian.nai.ri.jpg
Photo.Title: Wow - look at the snow mountains!!!
